testcase.name: Agentic Flow Monitoring Dashboard › should load dashboard with system health metrics
Agentic Flow Monitoring Dashboard › should display IRIS metrics interface
Agentic Flow Monitoring Dashboard › should load IRIS Pattern Detection & Alerts
Agentic Flow Monitoring Dashboard › should display Production Maturity Status limits
Agentic Flow Monitoring Dashboard › should show replenishment candidates matrix
Agentic Flow Monitoring Dashboard › should be accessible (WCAG 2.1 Level AA) baseline check
